column1: # 1-2-3 R3 dirty-quit guard: /QY on a modified workbook does NOT exit
# immediately. It opens a second No/Yes confirm warning that the
# worksheet has unsaved changes. From there:
#   - N (or default Enter) → back to READY, session continues
# Clean-path regression (clean workbook: /QY exits with no second
# confirm) is already covered by M3_quit.tsv.
# Dirty the workbook with a label.
# Press Y → second confirm appears, session is still running. The
# warning surfaces in the highlighted item's help text on line 3 since
# our control-panel renderer reserves line 1 for the cell readout.
# Press N → cancel back to READY, still running.
